name: cs-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for web testing, planning, and code review

plugins.name: convo-maker
plugins.description: 세션 Q&A를 자연스러운 미국식 영어 대화로 변환 - Convert session Q&A into natural American English conversations for language learning

plugins.name: smart-run
plugins.description: Two-phase orchestrator: Plan with Opus → Execute with Sonnet agents in parallel (/smart-run)

plugins.name: cs-experiencing
plugins.description: 4-domain knowledge repository: CS-test (14-agent web testing), CS-plan (TDD+CleanArch 4-agent), CS-codebase-review (5-agent parallel review), CS-design (5-agent design review)

plugins.name: CS-test
plugins.description: 14-agent AI Teams web testing - security, SEO, performance, DB, touch, image optimization

plugins.name: CS-plan
plugins.description: TDD + Clean Architecture 4-agent planning - domain analysis, architecture, test strategy, implementation checklist

plugins.name: CS-codebase-review
plugins.description: 5-agent parallel codebase review - Architecture, Quality, Security, Performance, Maintainability

plugins.name: cs-design
plugins.description: 5-agent parallel design review - visual hierarchy, interaction quality, design system consistency, responsive/accessibility, anti-pattern detection
